title: neobartlettia pansamalensis
intro: Neobartlettia pansamalensis, a plant species native to Mexico, is a member of the Asteraceae family and is also known as the "Mexican daisy". The medicinal properties of Neobartlettia pansamalensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for various purposes. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Neobartlettia pansamalensis can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
